message:
feat(e2e): add VCR cassette mismatch and lint failure root-cause classifiers to run_all triage

Extends the Python root-cause classifier in scripts/e2e/run_all.sh:

vcr_mismatch classification:
- Detects "no matching interaction found in cassette", "vcr cassette
  missing or invalid", and "match criteria: method + url + body +
  body_text" signatures from VCR playback failures
- Remediation hint: re-record or refresh the affected cassette, verify
  dynamic prompt context (cwd/project instructions/timestamps) remains
  stable for playback matching

lint_failure classification:
- Detects combined "clippy" + "error:" signatures from clippy lint runs
- Remediation hint: run clippy on the failing target and resolve the
  first emitted lint error before rerunning suites

Both classifiers are placed in priority order: vcr_mismatch before
assertion_failure (since VCR failures often surface as assertion
errors), lint_failure after network_io (since lint failures are less
common in e2e suites).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
